chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No. S- 593 of 2022 Muhammad Hassan ------------------- Petitioner VERSUS Province of Sindh and others ----------------- Respondents Date of hearing: & decision: 29.08.2022 None present for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. along with Insp. Abdul Haq Korai, SHO PS 60-Mile Shaheed Benazirabad. Mst. Kausar and Ali (detenees). O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J-. Through the instant petition, the petitioner has prayed for directions to respondents 2 and 3 to conduct a surprise raid and recover the detainees who are illegally confined by private respondents 4 to 7 and produce them before this court for recording their statements. After filing of the above petition, notices were issued to official respondents for recovery of alleged detainees and in compliance with such notices on the last date of hearing i.e. 26.8.2022 the alleged detainee No.1 Mst. Kausar was released and she was present before the court; for the remaining detainee namely Ali son of Shafi Muhammad, directions were issued to SSP Shaheed Benazirabad to ensure production of the said alleged detainee and in case of failure DIG, Shaheed Benazirabad shall appear in person. Today, Insp. Abdul Haq Korai, SHO PS 60-Mile Shaheed Benazirabad has produced the alleged detainee Ali son of Shafi Muhammad, who stated that he was in the custody of some Mari clan people; however, Mst. Kausar is satisfied and seeks disposal of the instant petition as the purpose of filing the instant petition has been served in terms of their release from illegal custody, however, she seeks legal protection and intends to go with her husband who is present in court.

Abdul Haq Korai, SHO PS 60-Mile Shaheed Benazirabad has produced the alleged detainee Ali son of Shafi Muhammad, who stated that he was in the custody of some Mari clan people; however, Mst. Kausar is satisfied and seeks disposal of the instant petition as the purpose of filing the instant petition has been served in terms of their release from illegal custody, however, she seeks legal protection and intends to go with her husband who is present in court. So far as Ali son of Shafi Muhammad is concerned he intends to go with her mother. Police official present in court is directed to ensure the safe journey of Mst. Kausar and Ali to their destination; and he is also directed to ensure that no harassment is caused to them. Accordingly, the instant petition is disposed of being served its purpose. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
